_publications._publicationTitle: Establishment of immortalized murine mesothelial cells and a novel mesothelioma cell line.

_contextSnippet: As expected, primary mesothelial cells of either genotype (WT, Nf2+/−), as well as the murine macrophage cell line RAW264.7, did not express TAg evidenced by Western blotting. Strong TAg expression was observed in all primary mesothelial cell clones transfected with the lentivirus coding for TAg/tag
details: Antibody showed no expression in primary mesothelial cells and RAW264.7 cells, but strong expression in all SV40-transfected clones
